description: Sweep, the ultra-lightweight sandals from adidas in a pretty plum colour with beach prints on the footbed and neon green thongs are a perfect pair for your beach or pool parties. Pair them with your feminine skirts and tops or shorts for an ultra-chic look.UpperSynthetic leather thong straps in cross-over style for ankle supportRubber toe separatorPU footbed with beach print for all-day massage feel with printed brandingOutsoleTPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum tractionSandal careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash
